hero.headline: *Same-Day Response* Roofing Repair & Replacement
hero.subheadline: 5-star rated Charlotte roofers fix leaks fast and install premium roofing systems. No runaround, just honest estimates and quality work you can count on.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Complete Roofing Services
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to full replacements, we handle every roofing need with precision and care

services.title: Emergency Roof Repair
services.description: Fast response to storm damage, leaks, and missing shingles. We'll secure your home and provide permanent repairs that last.

services.title: Complete Roof Replacement
services.description: Premium shingle, metal, and tile roofing systems installed by certified professionals. Includes warranty and comprehensive cleanup.

services.title: Gutter Installation & Repair
services.description: Seamless gutters, downspouts, and gutter guards to protect your foundation. Proper drainage prevents costly water damage.

services.title: Free Roof Inspections
services.description: Thorough assessment of your roof's condition with detailed photos and honest recommendations. No pressure, just facts.

about.heading: Charlotte's Most Trusted Roofing Contractors
about.body: AG Roofing has protected Charlotte-area homes for over 15 years. Our certified team combines old-school craftsmanship with modern materials, ensuring every roof we touch stands strong against Carolina weather. We're the neighbors you can trust with your biggest investment.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Called AG Roofing after storm damage and they were at my house within 3 hours. Fixed the leak the same day and gave me a fair estimate for full replacement. Professional crew, clean work site.

reviews.name: Mike R.
reviews.text: Complete roof replacement took 2 days. They protected my landscaping, cleaned up perfectly, and the new roof looks amazing. Price was $3k less than other quotes.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: Free inspection caught problems I didn't know existed. They could have oversold me but recommended repairs instead of replacement. Saved me thousands. Honest company.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Charlotte
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times to homes and businesses throughout the Charlotte metro area

cta.heading: Ready to Fix Your Roof?
cta.body: Don't wait for small problems to become big expenses. Get your free inspection and honest estimate today.
